Neon Miami: Operation Bloodline

You're a mysterious operative executing a brutal mission in a neon-soaked Miami building. Clear each room of armed enemies to progress through multiple floors. One hit kills - both for you and your enemies. Plan your approach, use stealth and speed, and eliminate all hostiles to complete your mission. The challenge escalates as you advance through increasingly dangerous floors filled with vigilant guards.

Neon Miami: Operation Bloodline

You're a mysterious operative executing a brutal mission in a neon-soaked Miami building. Clear each room of armed enemies to progress through multiple floors. One hit kills - both for you and your enemies. Plan your approach, use stealth and speed, and eliminate all hostiles to complete your mission. The challenge escalates as you advance through increasingly dangerous floors filled with vigilant guards.

Arrow Keys: Move in four directions | Space: Melee attack (close range, instant kill) | Z: Shoot weapon (ranged attack, limited ammo) | Shift: Sprint (move faster, but louder) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart to main menu
